Article.ArticleTitle: Effects of concurrent training on fat mass and its distribution in individuals with overweight or obesity: a systematic review, meta-analysis, and exploratory regression analysis.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: School of Physical Education and Sports Science, South China Normal University, Guangzhou, 510006, China.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: Not applicable. Consent for publication: Not applicable. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
